title: 10 best herbal teas for period cramps
intro_desc: Herbal teas for period cramps are a natural and effective way to alleviate menstrual cramps, which are caused by the contraction of the uterus during menstruation. These teas help to relax the uterine muscles, reduce inflammation, and ease pain. The best herbal teas for period cramps include Glycyrrhiza glabra, Zingiber officinale, Paeonia lactiflora, Ginkgo biloba, Crataegus monogyna, Vitex agnus-castus, Cimicifuga racemosa, Angelica archangelica, Lavandula angustifolia, and Foeniculum vulgare. If left untreated, period cramps can severely impact daily life, causing missed work or school, mood swings, and disrupted relationships.
